title: DecomposerOutput
description: Decomposer stage output: subtask graph with wave assignments. 3-7 subtasks is the sweet spot.

subtasks.description: Decomposed unit-of-work tasks. Each is one skilled agent's job.

description.description: What the agent on this subtask should accomplish

depends_on.description: IDs of subtasks this one waits for. Must form a DAG (no cycles).

wave.description: Wave number — equal-wave subtasks run in parallel
